title: arrhostoxylum coccineum
intro: Arrhostoxylum coccineum is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is commonly known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The medicinal properties of Arrhostoxylum coccineum include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Arrhostoxylum coccineum can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
